raw_consumer_statement:
I incorporate CFPB complaint XXXX herein. 

( 1 ) I purchased coffee and food from XXXX in XXXX for {$10.00} of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX charged me in USD instead of the local currency without my explicit permission or agreement. This added a currency conversion overhead to my bill. 
( 2 ) I filed a dispute with Barclays. Barclays denied it, but didn't send any correspondence on why it was denied. Barclays has NEVER sent any correspondence about dispute denials in the last 2 years. This way, consumers can not appeal it, and Barclays always wins.

( 3 ) I filed CFPB complaint XXXX. 
( 4 ) Barclays responded after 2 months with the following about why the dispute was denied : " We were not provided with a detailed description of what you were to receive. '' ( 5 ) Barclays, its presidential bot XXXX, and the XXXX in the Dispute Department do NOT know that XXXX is an XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, and that's what I was to receive. I wasn't ordering a business-class ticket to XXXX or XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXXuit for the Barclays presidential bot, XXXX. 
( 6 ) Barclays is operating fraudulently and is defrauding unsuspecting American Consumers in broad daylight. This company should be delicensed and heavily sanctioned.

( 7 ) Why is Barclays sending all correspondence by electronic means but never the Denial of Dispute reasons by electronic means? So it can defraud consumers.

( 8 ) Barclays is a snake oil salesman selling garbage to American Consumers and is worthy of exceptional fines and sanctions.

( 9 ) Please send this to FTC also. Thanks.
